headlines.description: — Tyler Herro scored 30 points, Bam Adebayo finished with 23 points and 16 rebounds, and the Miami Heat used a 14-0 run in the final moments to rally past the Philadelphia 76ers 119-109 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Heat rally late, use 14-0 run in final moments to pull away and beat 76ers 119-109

headlines.description: — Onyeka Okongwu and Jalen Johnson each scored 20 points, and three days after losing to the Celtics on the road, the Hawks responded with a 112-102 win over...
headlines.shortLinkText: Hawks surge past the Celtics 112-102, riding a big third quarter and a 13th straight home win
